task: everything should be on cloud... world & studio both. i dont want any kind of trouble later on. no data loss beacause of whatsoever reason. New js/creatorProjectCache.js (a sibling to tools/world-builder-v2/js/projectCache.js) is an IndexedDB cache tier sitting beneath js/creatorProjectStore.js's own localStorage catalog -- a synchronous in-memory Map mirror (hydrated from IndexedDB once at boot) plus a durably-queued, retry-forever background cloud push, reusing js/assetStore.js's own exponential-backoff ladder (newly exported as AssetStore.BACKOFF_MS) and trigger set. Nothing calls it yet -- zero behaviour-change risk, exactly Draft Asset Architecture's own Phase A discipline. Verified via a new scratch Playwright suite (hydrate/putLocal/get/list/removeLocal/drainPendingSync all correct in isolation; the untouched CreatorProjectStore/ProjectManager path confirmed unaffected) plus both goldenBuild.js suites, unchanged. No forced sign-in change for Studio -- the anonymous Traveller model and MagicCard.getActive() cloud-sync gate are completely untouched. See CLAUDE.md's own entry for the full design and the remaining Phase 2-6 rollout.
